description: Inputs that exploit recursive JSON parser depth to cause stack overflow or O(n) nesting traversal cost. JSON.parse on deeply nested objects/arrays can blow the call stack. The atomic emit has no recursive parser; it loops, so deeply nested inputs hit shape refusal immediately.

inputs.label: deeply-nested-arrays-1000
inputs.rationale: Outer structure is a nested array, not [i1,i2,...]; first char '[' OK but first element is another array — SyntaxError on inner '['

inputs.label: deeply-nested-objects-100
inputs.rationale: Not a bracket-list at all; leading '{' triggers SyntaxError at position 0

inputs.label: array-of-arrays
inputs.rationale: Outer list contains array elements — SyntaxError on first '[' element

inputs.label: large-flat-list-benign
inputs.rationale: Valid large flat integer list — should parse without error

inputs.label: triple-nested-array
inputs.rationale: Three levels of nesting; first element is [[1]] which is non-integer; SyntaxError on inner '['

inputs.label: array-with-object-element
inputs.rationale: Object element in integer list; SyntaxError on '{' at second element

inputs.label: json-with-nested-arrays-and-objects
inputs.rationale: Complex nested JSON object; leading '{' is immediate SyntaxError

inputs.label: two-dimensional-array
inputs.rationale: 2D array; first element '[1,2,3]' is not an integer — SyntaxError on '['

inputs.label: mixed-depth-array
inputs.rationale: Valid integer then array element; second element triggers SyntaxError on '['

inputs.label: deeply-nested-single-value
inputs.rationale: 10 levels deep; first element is [[[[[[[[1]]]]]]]] — SyntaxError on inner '['

inputs.label: flat-single-element-benign
inputs.rationale: Single valid integer element — control input
